name: Kangkung (Water Spinach)
description: Fast-growing tropical leafy vegetable. A staple in Southeast Asian cuisine. Thrives in heat and moisture.
care_tips: Can be grown in a container with a tray of water. Harvest frequently to stimulate regrowth.
nutrition_stages: seedling:10-10-10:liquid fertilizer:weekly | vegetative:15-5-5:liquid fertilizer:weekly | harvest:10-5-5:liquid fertilizer:biweekly
content: Kangkung (Water Spinach) Ipomoea aquatica Fast-growing tropical leafy vegetable. A staple in Southeast Asian cuisine. Thrives in heat and moisture. Can be grown in a container with a tray of water. Harvest frequently to stimulate regrowth. Difficulty: easy Growth days: 21

name: Lady Finger (Okra)
description: Heat-tolerant vegetable that thrives in tropical conditions. Produces abundantly through the year.
care_tips: Harvest pods at 7–10 cm length for best tenderness. Larger pods become tough and fibrous.

content: Lady Finger (Okra) Abelmoschus esculentus Heat-tolerant vegetable that thrives in tropical conditions. Produces abundantly through the year. Harvest pods at 7–10 cm length for best tenderness. Larger pods become tough and fibrous. Difficulty: easy Growth days: 55

name: Long Bean
description: Fast-producing tropical bean with pods up to 60 cm long. A popular vegetable in Malaysian home cooking.

name: Sweet Potato Leaves
description: Nutritious leafy vegetable widely eaten in Southeast Asia. Leaves and shoots are harvested young and stir-fried.

name: Spring Onion
description: One of the easiest vegetables to regrow from kitchen scraps. A continuous harvest staple.
care_tips: Regrow from cut bases in a glass of water, then transplant to soil. Keep soil slightly moist.

content: Spring Onion Allium fistulosum One of the easiest vegetables to regrow from kitchen scraps. A continuous harvest staple. Regrow from cut bases in a glass of water, then transplant to soil. Keep soil slightly moist. Difficulty: easy Growth days: 30

name: Lettuce
description: Cool-season leafy green. Ideal for indoor hydroponic or container setups. Best grown indoors in Malaysia to avoid heat.
care_tips: Avoid temperatures above 28°C or it will bolt. Harvest outer leaves regularly. Grow indoors or in shaded balcony.

content: Lettuce Lactuca sativa Cool-season leafy green. Ideal for indoor hydroponic or container setups. Best grown indoors in Malaysia to avoid heat. Avoid temperatures above 28°C or it will bolt. Harvest outer leaves regularly. Grow indoors or in shaded balcony. Difficulty: easy Growth days: 45

name: Microgreens
description: Nutrient-dense seedlings harvested 7–14 days after germination. Ideal for windowsill growing year-round.
care_tips: Mist twice daily. Harvest with scissors just above the soil line when first true leaves appear.

name: Lemon Grass

content: Lemon Grass Cymbopogon citratus Tropical grass with a citrus aroma, essential in many Asian dishes. Also a natural mosquito repellent. Harvest outer stalks when the clump is established. Divide clumps every 2 years. Difficulty: easy Growth days: 75

name: Ginger
description: Tropical rhizome used extensively in Malaysian and Asian cooking, teas, and traditional medicine. Thrives in warm, humid conditions.

name: Turmeric
description: Golden rhizome with powerful anti-inflammatory properties. A staple spice in Malaysian and Indian cuisine.

name: Curry Leaf

name: Banana (Dwarf)
